title: Present Simple
text: he/she/it + verbo con -s: She likes music. Errore tipico: she like.

title: Past Simple
text: Con yesterday, last week, ago usa il Past Simple: I went, I bought.

title: Present Perfect
text: have/has + participio: I have gone, she has seen. Non: I have went.

title: Will
text: Dopo will usa il verbo base: will go, will start. Non: will starts.

title: Past Continuous
text: was/were + verb-ing: I was walking, they were playing.

title: Prepositions
text: arrive in London, arrive at school, interested in, good at.

title: Email structure
text: Dear..., Thanks for your email..., Well, that’s all..., Best wishes.
